title: Gift Card Usage
description: Where can I use or spend my gift card?
narrative: The user is looking for information about where a gift card can be redeemed, including physical stores and online merchants that accept the card. Relevant documents should describe the network of participating outlets, provide maps or lists of locations, mention categories of retailers (e.g., fashion, beauty, sport, food), and explain any usage constraints such as validity periods or online vs in‑store use. Documents that only discuss purchasing or personal opinions about gift cards without detailing acceptance locations are not relevant.

title: Lamb Tagine Recipe
description: What is a traditional lamb tagine recipe, including ingredients, spices, and step‑by‑step preparation?
narrative: The user is looking for a classic lamb tagine preparation: a concise list of ingredients (lamb, standard North‑African spices, vegetables, olives, preserved lemon, etc.) and clear cooking instructions. Relevant documents are those that present a complete, traditional lamb tagine recipe with ingredient quantities and cooking steps. Documents that describe alternative or specialty versions (e.g., lamb tagine with prunes, dates, butternut squash, or other non‑standard add‑ins) are not relevant.

title: Lotus Car
description: What information is available about Lotus automobiles, including models, specifications, pricing, and purchase options?
narrative: The user is interested in learning about Lotus vehicles. Relevant documents should mention Lotus models (e.g., Elise), provide technical specifications, pricing details, or listings for buying new or used Lotus cars. Documents that are general car‑sale platforms without specific Lotus content, or unrelated topics such as supermarkets or rental services, are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes Recipe
description: What are the ingredients, steps, and tips for cooking veal paupiettes?
narrative: The user is looking for a complete cooking guide for "paupiettes de veau" — a list of required ingredients, detailed preparation and cooking instructions, recommended cooking times, and possible variations (e.g., sauces, fillings, accompaniments). Relevant documents are those that provide full recipes, cooking techniques, and practical tips. Documents that only discuss side dishes, forum comments, or unrelated product listings are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What products or methods can be used to protect a vehicle’s interior and its occupants from sunlight, heat, and UV radiation?
narrative: Relevant documents describe car sun‑visors, window‑tint or solar‑film kits, and other UV‑blocking accessories that reduce glare, heat and UV exposure for passengers and interior surfaces, including installation instructions, types of visors, legal limits for tint, and benefits such as privacy and energy savings. Documents that only mention unrelated items (e.g., baby sunscreen, unrelated retail listings) are not relevant.

title: Small Vessels
description: What are the types, sizes, and typical uses of small watercraft?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on small vessels such as kayaks, canoes, dinghies, and small motorboats. Relevant material should describe definitions, dimensions, capacities, design features, common activities (recreation, fishing, transport), safety guidelines, and any relevant regulations. Documents that focus on unrelated subjects—e.g., clothing brands named "Petit Bateau"—are not relevant.

title: Renault Passenger Cars
description: What Renault passenger car models, prices, and purchase/lease options are available, especially through employee or collaborator programs?

Relevant documents are those that detail Renault vehicle offers, pricing structures, leasing terms, insurance and financing information. Documents about other brands or unrelated automotive topics are not relevant.

title: War School Info
description: What is the War School (École de Guerre) and how can I obtain its books, courses, or contact information?
narrative: The user is seeking details about the institution commonly called the War School, including its purpose, publications (e‑books, paper editions), enrollment process, and ways to purchase or download its materials. Relevant documents describe the School of War’s mission, its catalogue of books, ordering and payment procedures, and contact details. Documents that merely mention other schools, unrelated forms, or generic debate topics are not relevant.

title: Option Right
description: What is the "right of option" in the French unemployment system and how can a jobseeker use it?
narrative: The user is looking for a clear explanation of the "right of option" offered by Pôle Emploi, including its definition, eligibility requirements (e.g., amount of work performed, daily allowance thresholds), the procedure to request it, the consequences of exercising it, and how it differs from ordinary reloading of rights. Relevant documents are those that describe the option right, its conditions, application steps, and effects on unemployment benefits.

title: AXA Client Space
description: How can I access and use the AXA online client portal for insurance and banking services?

Relevant documents should describe the AXA Customer Space, its features, security recommendations (HTTPS, official domain), and provide guidance on navigating the portal for managing contracts, documents, and claims. title: Best Electric Car

Relevant documents are those that describe electric car models, their prices, technical specs, performance figures, and comparative assessments. Documents that only discuss financial incentives, regulatory stickers, or unrelated administrative information are not relevant.

title: Late Blight Control
description: What are the symptoms, treatment options, and preventive measures for late blight on potatoes?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about late blight affecting potatoes. Relevant results should describe the disease (causal pathogen, typical yellow‑to‑brown leaf spots and tuber rot), how to recognize it in the field, and detailed management strategies such as cultural practices (crop rotation, resistant varieties, spacing, moisture control), chemical or organic controls (e.g., copper‑based sprays, bicarbonate solutions, Bordeaux porridge), and post‑infection considerations (whether infected tubers are safe to eat, seed saving, and sanitation). Documents that only list potato varieties without discussing late blight, or that focus on unrelated gardening topics, are not relevant.

title: Heaven Earth Phrase

Relevant documents must directly mention "From Heaven to Earth" and be connected to Monique Mathieu, the associated website, or the broader New Age channeling context. title: Mad Space History

description: What is the TV series referred to as “The Legacy Office”, and where can I find details such as its synopsis, cast, seasons, and streaming options?

title: Prevail Meaning
description: What is the definition of the verb "prevail" and how is it conjugated in French and English?

Non‑relevant documents are those that do not discuss the verb’s meaning or conjugation (e.g., legal notices, unrelated web content).

title: Gallic Meaning

title: Potato Diseases
